name: Deluxe Nachos
recipeInstructions:
1. Place beans, whole onion, and ham hock in a saucepan. Add water to cover.
2. Bring mixture to boil over medium heat. Cover and simmer for 1½ hours, or until beans are tender.
3. Remove onion and ham hock. Drain beans.
4. Heat lard in a large skillet over high heat. Add beans and mash with a potato masher.
5. Season to taste with salt.
6. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
7. Cut tortillas into quarters and fry in hot lard until crisp. Remove from oil and season lightly with salt.
8. Arrange tortilla pieces in a single layer on an ovenproof platter.
9. Sprinkle half each of Jack and cheddar cheeses over the chips.
10. Sprinkle chopped Jalapeno chiles over the cheese mixture.
11. Dollop refried beans evenly over the top.
12. Gently spread beans to cover the mixture.
13. Sprinkle with half of the remaining cheese.
14. Top with diced tomatoes and chopped cilantro.
15. Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, or until cheeses are melted and bubbly.
15. Serve immediately.
